name: Datamapper Agent

skillDescriptions.datamapper-agent: Entry point — invoke when asked to create or edit a datamapper
skillDescriptions.datamapper-plan: Discovers inputs, builds the mapper-spec.json, runs pre-flight validation, presents the plan for approval. Called by datamapper-agent.
skillDescriptions.datamapper-build: Executes an approved spec end-to-end (create/update/create-then-delete-old, bind, rescan). Called by datamapper-plan after user approval.
skillDescriptions.datamapper-verify: Confirms the build landed correctly — scan status, sample rows, aggregations, null checks. Called automatically by datamapper-build.

initialPrompt: Read AGENT_TASK.md and AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md, then invoke /datamapper-agent to begin.

inputs.label: Additional context
inputs.placeholder: Source file structure, hardcoded fields (Entity, Data Type), specific change requested, etc.
